title: microcos havilandii
intro: Microcos havilandii, also known as the Malay tea tree, is a species of plant in the family Melastomataceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Microcos havilandii include reducing fever, treating infections, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Microcos havilandii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
